articles.author: Terrence O'Brien
articles.title: Benn Jordan longs for the days of tech that didn’t spy on you - The Verge
articles.description: YouTuber and musician Benn Jordan has gone from reviewing synths to exposing the flaws in our surveillance state.
articles.content: Benn Jordan longs for the days of tech that didnt spy on you The YouTube star has gone from reviewing synths to taking on the surveillance state. by Terrence … [+6294 chars]
